name: YouTube Creators
storePolicy: Store short notes and source URL only. Do not copy full pages.

name: YouTube Studio Inspiration
storePolicy: Store idea patterns and user-approved examples only.

name: YouTube Studio Analytics Help
storePolicy: Store metric definitions and decision rules only.

name: Google Trends
storePolicy: Store trend query, score, region, date, and short summary.

name: TikTok Creative Center Trends
storePolicy: Store trend labels, region, industry, and short observation.

name: Reddit
storePolicy: Store short paraphrased insight and thread URL. Avoid private/personal data.

name: Product Hunt
storePolicy: Store product name, launch angle, category, and URL.

name: GSMArena
storePolicy: Store factual specs, model names, and URL. Do not copy reviews.

name: Hugging Face Datasets
storePolicy: Use only datasets with compatible licenses. Store dataset name, license, and examples allowed by license.

name: Kaggle Datasets
storePolicy: Use only datasets with compatible licenses. Store dataset name, license, and examples allowed by license.
